text.title: Architecture Workflows Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw trigger to closed workflow-instance.

step.name: classify-trigger
step.action: Map trigger to one of seven workflow_type values. Triggers not matching → use general SDD methodology instead.
step.decision-gate: No match → abort; do not invent custom workflows.

step.name: instantiate-step-list
step.action: Look up canonical step list for the chosen workflow. Pre-fill name + artefact_path placeholders + decision_type per step.

step.name: assign-roles
step.action: For each step, pick one role from {clarifier, designer, critic, documenter, stakeholder}; bind to a real person name. Ensure ≥2 distinct people across the workflow.
step.output: steps[] with role + reviewer fields populated
step.decision-gate: If one person owns >2 distinct roles across ≥4 steps, fail role-overload check.

step.name: declare-abort
step.action: Write a concrete abort_condition string (observable signal). Examples: "stakeholder map cannot be assembled within 2 days", "decision deadline reached without scorecard".

step.name: run-with-gates
step.action: Execute steps in order. After each step, validate artefact exists on disk. For type-1 decision steps, route to reviewer; block transition until review_gate clears. Re-check abort_condition at every gate.
step.output: Closed workflow-instance with closed_at timestamp + all artefacts on disk
